title: Agent Object Model (AOM)™ Output Schema
description: Standardized output envelope for AI agents operating on AOM™ surfaces. Supports confidence scoring, workflow tracking, and native A2H (Agent-to-Human) communication intents.

mode.description: 'single' = one-shot result. 'flow' = step in multi-step agent loop.

agent_id.description: Logical name or identifier of the agent producing this output.

step_id.description: Monotonic step identifier within a flow.

thought.description: Agent's natural-language reasoning for this step. For debugging and transparency, not machine consumption.

action.description: Action the agent requests the runtime to execute. action_id MUST match an AOM actions[].id.

action_id.description: Identifier of AOM action to execute. Use 'none' if no action is required or if escalating to a human.

params.description: Parameters for the action. Must be empty if action_id is 'none'.

result.description: Final result payload for the task. Present when meta.done=true or mode='single'.

meta.description: Control flags, production intelligence, and human escalation intents for the runtime.

confidence.description: Agent's self-reported confidence in this step's action/result (0.0 to 1.0).

a2h_intent.description: Agent-to-Human (A2H) communication intent. Used when the agent pauses execution to interact with a human.

type.description: A2H intent type (from surface a2h, action a2h_policy, or test case).

escalation_channel.description: Channel on which the agent escalated to human (from surface a2h or action a2h_policy or test case).

workflow.description: Flow handoff: when meta.done is true in a multi-step flow, runtime uses flow_id + next_step_id to load the next surface (e.g. step02_cart.aom.json).

flow_id.description: Must match state.workflow.flow_id of the current and next surface in the flow.

next_step_id.description: Step id of the next surface (e.g. 'step02'); used to select the next .aom.json in the flow.
